clauses.text: Die setting height and production height must use mm as the unit.
Calibration force must use kN as the unit and must be checked after first-article approval.
Side piercing clearance is adjusted according to sheet thickness and burr quality.
SC, stamping mark, calibration mark, and quick locating symbols must be linked to image or symbol evidence.
OP40 extraction must preserve operation identity, station address, equipment, tooling, parameters, and sketch annotations in the same document partition.
